name: Gemini Investments (Holdings) Limited
summary: Gemini Investments (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, engages in property investment and development, and other businesses in Hong Kong, the United States, and internationally. It leases office and residential properties; develops commercial and residential properties; and invests in various investment funds and securities. The company also invests in real estate fund platform. The company was formerly known as Gemini Property Investments Limited and changed its name to Gemini Investments (Holdings) Limited in July 2011. The company was incorporated in 1987 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
